title: Edit the captions and labels of charts
excerpt: I use Monday to visualize some data with the rest of my team. However, I can’t edit any of the captions. For example if the name is too long it automatically cuts it. However, if it was using a different layout, I would …

posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
I use Monday to visualize some data with the rest of my team. However, I can’t edit any of the captions. For example if the name is too long it automatically cuts it. However, if it was using a different layout, I would be able to see the whole text.

Screenshot 2025-05-16 1133541322×332 14.9 KB

I would like to be able to modify my caption and place it wherever fits better.
Thanks!
